top3: Example takeaway one: a synthetic sample entry demonstrating the top-of-digest summary line. Replace with your own when the scheduled task first runs.
Example takeaway two: another sample line showing the voice and density the agent aims for — punchy, specific, with numbers where they exist.
Example takeaway three: the third slot rounds out the daily scan — typically a thematic or contrarian take.
convergence: Example thematic call-out: when 2+ items cluster around the same idea, the agent surfaces the pattern here.

news.takeaway: Example news item — demonstrates the takeaway shape. HTML is allowed for inline formatting, emphasis, and light structure.

sources.author: Sample Author
sources.gist: One-line gist describing what this specific source contributed to the takeaway above.
Complementary source — shows how multiple publications can share a takeaway.

news.takeaway: Second example news item — shows the template rendering with two entries. Your real digests will have up to 5.

sources.author: Jane Q. Sample
sources.gist: Subscription tag lapsed signals the source is referenced but the reader is not currently paying for it.

alerts.headline: Example alert
alerts.detail: Alerts are short one-liners surfacing time-sensitive events: launches, outages, policy shifts.

also_seen: Optional footer for items that didn't rank but were worth noting.

top3: Archived example entry — demonstrates how past digests appear under the Archive section.
